{{Quote|I'm Sergeant Mercious Bragg of the RSF Intelligence Division. We need to find out who was behind the terrorist attack on our city before things escalate further. So far, no one has claimed responsibility.|Mercious Bragg|<ref name="SWG:TtCotFMCG" />}}
'''Mercious Bragg''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] in the [[RSF Intelligence Division|Intelligence Division]] of the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Sometime following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], a section of [[Theed/Legends|Theed]] fell victim to a [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] [[Terrorist attack in Theed|attack]]. Sergeant Bragg, who often conducted business in the [[Capital/Legends|capital's]] [[Theed Cantina|local cantina]], was tasked with discovering the identity of the culprits. With the help of a [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] loyal to the RSF, Bragg investigated the headquarters of the four major criminal organization on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], namely the [[Skaak Tippers]], [[Borvo]] the Hutt's [[Nal Raka Criminal Empire|criminal empire]], the [[Darkwalkers]] and the [[Mummers]]. Sergeant Bragg eventually concluded that the Mummers were responsible for the attack.<ref name="SWG:TtCotFMCG" /> Following this revelation, the Royal Naboo Security forces conducted a [[Raid on the Mummer bunker|raid]] on the [[Mummer bunker]], neutralizing the Mummer's ability to enact future terror attacks.<ref name="SWG:BTttT">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Bring Terror to the Terrorists|Naboo}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Mercious Bragg was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Roleplaying game|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:TtCotFMCG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Mercious Bragg was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:Legacy Quest|Legacy Quest]]" with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
